name: Horror City Minecraft Survive
description: Enter a chilling world of suspense and danger in Horror City Minecraft Survive, an online survival game set in a haunting Minecraft-inspired city. In this thrilling adventure, you must navigate a city overrun by terrifying creatures and eerie environments. The game combines the creativity of Minecraft-style block-building with intense survival mechanics, making it a gripping experience for fans of horror and sandbox games alike.
instructions: Instructions Move around the map to try to escape in each level before the Minecraft ghosts find you and you cant escape Controls WASD to move around the map Spacebar to jump Mouse to move the camera F to interact with items
